## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Paste the exact commands you ran
tayto ...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include full output / error messages.

## Environment

- Tayto version: <!-- tayto --version -->
- Node.js version: <!-- node --version -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Terminal: <!-- e.g. iTerm2, Warp, Windows Terminal -->
